text:
Once upon a time in a grove known only to the whispering willows...

There lived a girl named Luna. She was unlike the other children; where others loved shiny things, she adored the nocturnal creatures that glided through the moonlit woods. Her favorite isle is untouched by civilization, where owls call symphonies to each other.

One twilight, while exploring a forgotten path, Luna stumbled upon an ancient oaken chest. Inside was an amulet with a gleaming silver owl. She wore it daily, feeling its ancient wisdom in every turn.

One day, as Luna wandered along the brook near her cottage, she heard a soft rustle. Instinctively, she spun around...and there were owls. Hundreds. They chirped in a language so deep it felt like music.

They invited her into their nest. Together they watched the sunset, hearing tales of forests old and wisdom shared with young owlets. Luna learned that owls could hear a
